title: Merriway BH05285 (2 Pcs) Flanged Back Nut Brass 3/4 Inch BSP - Pack of 2 Pieces
features: Pack of 2 x Flanged Back Nut Brass 3/4 Inch BSP
If instructions for fixing, assembly or maintenance of the products are included in the packaging then please ensure that they are followed
description: From the manufacturer Merriway is a British brand that has been established for almost 50 years as a manufacturer of hardware, ironmongery, DIY, furniture fittings and housewares. The business is still owned and operated by the original founders, from premises in Wiltshire that have grown to cover a floor area of nearly 100,000 sq ft, with a workforce of close to 100 people. Merriway is a registered trade mark (UK regn. no. 3360633 / International regn. no. 1484251).
